title: Friendly Farm Animals Coloring
description: A simple coloring page featuring easy-to-color farm animals with clean outlines, perfect for young artists to practice fine motor skills while learning about common animals.
instructions: Color the animals using your favorite colors. Try to stay inside the lines. Can you name each animal as you color it?

content.image: A barnyard scene with simple outlines of a smiling pig, fluffy sheep, friendly cow, and happy chicken. Each animal is drawn with clean single lines that are easy to follow.
learningFacts: Pigs are very smart animals that can learn tricks
Sheep grow wool that can be used to make clothes
Cows give us milk that we can drink
Chickens lay eggs that we can eat
